data.title: Remove ast-grep installation block from root README.md (migrated to INSTALL.md); clear RED marker
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Purpose
Remove the ast-grep installation instructions from root README.md — those instructions have been migrated to INSTALL.md Optional Dependencies (previous task). After this task, the full test-install-doc-contract.sh suite passes; remove the RED marker.

## File Impact
- README.md (repo root) — EDIT (remove ast-grep install block)
- .test-index — EDIT (remove [test_install_doc_contract] RED marker)

## Implementation Steps
1. Open `README.md` at repo root.
2. Locate the existing ast-grep installation block (brew install ast-grep instructions).
3. Delete that block. If the README is left nearly empty, add a single pointer line:
   `For installation instructions, see [INSTALL.md](INSTALL.md).`
   Do NOT rewrite the rest of README.md — that is scope for story 6845-09e4 (Layer 2).
4. Run `bash tests/test-install-doc-contract.sh` — all assertions should now pass (exit 0).
5. Remove the `[test_install_doc_contract]` marker line from `.test-index`.
6. Verify `bash tests/test-install-doc-contract.sh` still exits 0.
7. Commit.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
- [ ] README.md no longer contains the ast-grep brew install block (or if it references ast-grep, it points to INSTALL.md)
  Verify: ! grep -qF 'brew install ast-grep' README.md || grep -qF 'INSTALL.md' README.md
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -qF '[test_install_doc_contract]' .test-index
- [ ] test-install-doc-contract.sh passes (full contract satisfied)
  Verify: bash tests/test-install-doc-contract.sh
